title: QAQC Engineer
description:
Job Description - Quality Assurance

· Review of project quality requirements, project quality plan (PQP), method statements, inspection & test plans (ITPs), and inspection checklists.

· Develop inspection and test plan (ITPs) and inspection checklists based on project works specifications.

· Assists in projects’ internal quality management system audit and quality inspection audit.

· Data collection and documentation for defects monitoring and trend analysis in measuring project quality performance and root cause investigation and analysis to improve project performance.

· Promote the best practices in project quality management to reduce the cost of poor quality and to improve work productivity.

Job Description - Quality Control

· Conduct onsite in-process inspections or periodic site/factory quality surveillance inspections.

· Monitor and verify site execution works whether the established work procedures, inspections and approved submittals are being followed accordingly.

· Identity, record and highlight to Project Manager of any identified non-conformances or potential quality issues or risks.

· Issue and monitor closure of Quality Observation Reports (QARs), Internal Non-conformance Reports (NCRs), Corrective/Preventive Action Requests (C/PARs)

· Verify the implementation of solutions and control further works or processes until the non-conformities or deficiencies have been resolved.

· Conduct internal inspection of mock-up unit, CONQUAS/QM pre-assessment and pre-handing over inspection.

· Preparation of periodic QA/QC Reports, maintenance of quality records and any necessary QA/QC documentations at project sites.

postedCompany.description:
Our Story

Since our founding in 1992, Teambuild Construction Group has transformed into a dynamic, multi-disciplinary powerhouse in the construction industry. Specializing in residential, institutional, and industrial projects, we pride ourselves on our commitment to technical excellence and high safety standards, earning us over 150 prestigious awards.

Leading the Way in Innovation

Teambuild is at the forefront of construction innovation. As pioneers of Prefabricated Pre-Finished Volumetric Construction (PPVC) in Singapore, we also embrace the latest in IDD and BIM technologies to stay ahead.

Investing in Our People

Our greatest asset is our talented team of over 1,200 employees. We are committed to nurturing their growth through our Career Mentorship Programme (CMP). This 6-year fast track programme transforms young engineers into Project Managers, providing comprehensive training in both technical and soft skills.

Embracing Technology

Our passion for technology and innovation ensures we lead the industry in construction excellence. We continuously adopt new advancements to maintain our competitive edge.

Be Part of Our Journey

At Teambuild Construction Group, we offer more than just a job; we provide a platform for growth and achievement. Experience a dynamic workplace where innovation and excellence thrive. Join us in Building Excellence and Shaping the Future!

Teambuild Construction Group - Building Excellence, Shaping the Future!
postedCompany.name: TEAMBUILD ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION PTE. LTD.
